mapper.select: SELECT id, yard_cd, vehicle_nm, vehicle_type, current_x, current_z, heading, speed, status, assigned_route_id, is_off_route, last_updated, created_at, updated_at FROM yard_vehicle WHERE yard_cd = #{yardCd} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yard_vehicle (yard_cd, vehicle_nm, vehicle_type, current_x, current_z, status) VALUES (#{yardCd}, #{vehicleNm}, #{vehicleType}, #{currentX}, #{currentZ}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE yard_vehicle SET current_x = #{currentX}, current_z = #{currentZ}, heading = #{heading}, speed = #{speed}, last_updated = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE yard_vehicle SET status = #{status}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE yard_vehicle SET is_off_route = #{isOffRoute}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE yard_vehicle SET assigned_route_id = #{routeId}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{vehicleId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, yard_cd, route_nm, vehicle_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM yard_route WHERE yard_cd = #{yardCd} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, yard_cd, route_nm, vehicle_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM yard_route WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, route_id, seq, position_x, position_z, action_type FROM yard_route_waypoint WHERE route_id = #{routeId} ORDER BY seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yard_route (yard_cd, route_nm, vehicle_id, status) VALUES (#{yardCd}, #{routeNm}, #{vehicleId}, #{status})
INSERT INTO yard_route_waypoint (route_id, seq, position_x, position_z, action_type) VALUES (#{routeId}, #{seq}, #{positionX}, #{positionZ}, #{actionType})
mapper.select: SELECT id, yard_cd, vehicle_id, route_id, deviation_dist, detected_by_cctv_id, position_x, position_z, acknowledged, created_at FROM yard_route_deviation WHERE yard_cd = #{yardCd} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yard_route_deviation (yard_cd, vehicle_id, route_id, deviation_dist, detected_by_cctv_id, position_x, position_z) VALUES (#{yardCd}, #{vehicleId}, #{routeId}, #{deviationDist}, #{detectedByCctvId}, #{positionX}, #{positionZ})
mapper.update: UPDATE yard_route_deviation SET acknowledged = true WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, yard_cd, vehicle_nm, vehicle_type, current_x, current_z, heading, speed, status, assigned_route_id, is_off_route, last_updated, created_at, updated_at FROM yard_vehicle WHERE id = #{id}
